Backed by  ·  Google for Startups

Chapter i  ·  The Thesis

The operating system
for brilliant work.

Brand and life are not separate problems. They share the same operator. Brilliance treats both as one system, with two modes that act on their own context and inform each other when it matters.

Mode I

BrandAI

Eight agents. One brand identity at the core.

  • Identity SubstrateVoice and standards injected into every output.
  • Studio150+ operations. Run one. Pipe many.
  • BloomTwenty fresh brand angles on demand.
  • LibraryYour work, indexed across every brand.
  • AutomationsMulti-step pipelines and scheduled work.

Mode II

LifeAI

Five coaches. The operator behind the work.

  • PulseGoals, calendar, rhythm in one frame.
  • Identity IntelligenceFinances, health, family understood deeply.
  • Tax CopilotAware of every brand's revenue, year-round.
  • Wellness GuideSleep, training, recovery, mind.
  • RemindersGoals tracked alongside the work they support.

Brand and life share a single memory. Cross-mode intelligence is the moat.

Backed by

Selected for Google for Startups.

Brilliance is backed by Google for Startups. Vetted infrastructure, technical mentorship, and direct access to Google's AI roadmap. Built independently. Backed by serious cloud.

Yours, end to end

Your brand. Your voice.
Your brilliance.

Coming to Brilliance

Meet Brilli.

The platform's voice. A single intelligence that knows your brand, your day, and your standards. Not another chatbot. The conversation Brilliance has with you.

In development  ·  Founding Members first

What it is

Brilliance is the intelligence layer that learns who you are, how you operate, and what your work demands. Brand and life, one operating system. Sovereign by design. Yours, completely.

See the full platform

Chapter iii  ·  The Difference

Less noise.
Pure brilliance.

Most AI products are a thin wrapper on someone else's model. Brilliance is built on four decisions that compound into the difference operators feel.

i.

Sovereign by design.

Most platforms hold your data and mediate every prompt.

Brilliance routes browser-direct to the model. We do not see, store, or relay your work.

ii.

Identity at the infrastructure level.

Most platforms make you paste your brand into every prompt.

Brilliance injects your identity before the model sees the request. Your brand is the prompt.

iii.

Cross-mode intelligence.

Most platforms silo brand work from personal life.

Brand and life share one memory. Your Tax Copilot sees every brand's revenue.

iv.

Multi-model routing.

Most platforms lock you to one model family.

Claude, Gemini, GPT. Brilliance routes intelligently and falls back gracefully.

Finally, a platform
as brilliant as you.

Begin with a free month. Bring your keys, your brand, your work. Decide on your own terms whether the difference is real.
